grapa.shared

Modules

colors_conversion

Provides conversions between different color spaces.

conditional_property_applier

constants

Module storing the values of physical constants, expressed in SI units.

constants_internals

error_management

Utility exceptions and warnings for grapa Concept: The API generates custom exceptions and warnings.

funcgui

Provides the FuncGUI class, and related functions to suggest to the user possible actions depending on the Curve typeplot.

keywords_loader

Lazy loader for keyword metadata used by graph/curve parsing and GUI hints.

logging_utils

Logging utilities for Grapa.

maths

Functions dealing with math

mpl_figure_factory

Utilities to dispatch Matplotlib/pyplot usage.
